description: Proactive pre-training readiness alert that fires BEFORE the user starts today's planned session. Integrates yesterday's HealthKit signals (HRV trend, RHR, sleep) + nutrition + recovery flags from ReadinessEngine v2 with today's training plan (DayType + volume from training-plan-v2). Outputs one of three smart recommendations (Continue / Rest day swap / Adapt to easier load) surfaced via AIInsightCard + push notification + AI avatar state. Includes Why? affordance that opens AIIntelligenceSheet with the readiness component breakdown that drove the recommendation.

transitions.reason: C2 from 2026-05-31 tier carryover plan (top of RICE-13.0 ranking after E1 refresh)
